title: Phase 3: Real waveform peaks in asset browser
description: After job-complete event, call get_waveform_peaks for the new audio file and store in jobStore alongside output_path. AssetBrowser shows real peaks via WaveformCanvas instead of Wave sin-bars.

title: One-shot inference setup script using uv venvs
description: Replace the conda-based first-time setup with an idempotent inference/setup.sh that uses uv to create local venvs (.venv-tts, .venv-music) with pinned requirements files. start_servers.sh defaults to these local venvs but stays overridable via env vars for users who want conda. SFX continues to use the Woosh uv venv it already has.

title: Drop misleading '~2s' ETA on character designer takes
description: In CharacterDesignerView pushJob, eta is hardcoded to ~2s but generation can take much longer. Replace with '…' to match the rest of the codebase.

title: Add takes list to TTS production panel
description: Voice/Dialogue panel currently has no way to see, play, or QA generated takes. Replace the static 'Voice model' sidebar text with a vertical list of recent takes for the active scene. Reuse TakeRow/TakeList from the character designer.

title: Phase 1: TypeScript data model + Zustand stores
description: Types for Project, Scene, ScriptRow, Asset, Job, SidecarMeta. Zustand stores: projectStore, jobStore, playbackStore, modelStore. Seeded with mockup data.

title: Wire Render Scene button with progress modal
description: The 'Render scene' button in CompositionView header calls renderScene() from tauriCommands. Show an inline render-state indicator (rendering/done/error) in the header. On completion, show the output path and a PlayButton to preview the render.wav in Web Audio.

title: Phase 2: Frontend modelStore + server health
description: src/store/modelStore.ts: server health state (tts/sfx/music status). Listen for Tauri job-progress/complete/failed events in jobStore. Transport bar shows server status dots. Poll health on mount.

title: Phase 4: QA approve/reject workflow
description: Add approve/reject buttons to asset rows in the browser. Calls update_sidecar_qa with qa_status='approved'/'rejected'. Show qa_status badge color (green/red/gray). Filter button to show only unreviewed takes.

title: Phase 2: Python inference stub servers
description: Three FastAPI servers in inference/: tts_server.py (port 18001), sfx_server.py (18002), music_server.py (18003). Stub endpoints that return fake audio (tiny WAV), proper /health, /generate/*, /jobs/{id} structure. In-memory job store with simulated async progress. requirements.txt pinned.

title: Project launcher view
Python inference server stubs (TTS / SFX / Music)
Phase 2: Rust sidecar + audio commands
description: commands/sidecar.rs: write_sidecar, read_sidecar, get_takes (atomic write, adjacent to WAV). commands/audio.rs: get_waveform_peaks (read WAV, compute peaks array), get_duration_ms. Wire into lib.rs.

title: Phase 1: Port design system from mockup
description: Port styles.css, Wave/Icon/StatusRing atoms to TypeScript. Preserve OKLCH color system, JetBrains Mono + Inter Tight, forest/warm/neutral theme vars.

title: Phase 1: csvParser.ts
description: Full read/write/update for script.csv. Support unresolved→resolved transition (file + start_ms + duration_ms population). Typed ScriptRow interface.

title: Phase 2: Wire generation panels to Tauri
description: Wire TTS/SFX/Music panel Generate buttons to submit_*_job commands. Job appears in JobQueue with live progress. On complete: write sidecar, update matching CSV rows, refresh asset browser.

title: Phase 4: Web Audio preview player
description: Add a lightweight Web Audio API player to the asset browser and timeline. Clicking any asset row or timeline clip should play back the audio. Controls: play/pause, position display. No full transport needed — just in-context previewing.

title: Phase 1: Port all React view components
description: PyramidView, CompositionView/Timeline, TTSPanel/SFXPanel/MusicPanel, StoryBibleView, AgentFeed, AssetBrowser, JobQueue, PlaybackBar. Convert from JSX to TSX.

title: Persistent AppConfig (Rust)
close_reason: AppConfig persistence implemented: Rust struct, load-on-startup in lib.rs, get/save commands in settings.rs, TypeScript types and commands wired

title: Fill missing CustomVoice checkpoint
description: SoX has been installed and documented in setup. Remaining environment gap: ~/pharaoh-models/tts/custom_voice is empty while base, voice_design, tokenizer, ACE-Step, and Woosh checkpoints are populated. Download/link Qwen3-TTS CustomVoice if preset-speaker generation is needed.

title: UX polish: center new-project form, hf CLI, remove TTS/SFX chips
Character Designer page: voice design + clone workflow
close_reason: Character Designer page shipped — voice design, clone, and custom voice tabs working

title: Fix TTS tokenizer file resolution for voice_design
description: voice_design fails to load when merges.txt or tokenizer.json is missing from its dir. The shared TOKENIZER_DIR only holds the speech codec; the symlink loop in tts_server.py only covers tokenizer.json + special_tokens_map.json. Extend resolution to cover the full text-tokenizer set and add a sibling-variant fallback so a complete base/ can supply files to voice_design/. Also update the SettingsView download command to pull the full text-tokenizer set into TOKENIZER_DIR.

title: Settings panel + server management UI
Scene creation UI in PyramidView
Clarify clone-mode direction: bracket directives only
description: In clone mode, generate_voice_clone has no instruct param - direction must come from inline [bracket] directives in the dialogue text. The current 'Direction · rich text' field gets sent as the spoken text. Update help/placeholder so users know to use [sad], [whisper], etc. inline.

title: Testing prep: README, setup guide, polish
description: Write README.md covering: prerequisites (Rust, Node, Python 3.11+), quick start (npm install, tauri dev), inference server setup (python -m venv, pip install, start_servers.sh), demo mode vs real project mode, known limitations. Also audit error handling, empty states, and obvious crashes.
close_reason: README written, committed, ready for local testing

title: Phase 2: Project open/create flow
description: ProjectPicker component shown when no project loaded. Lists ~/pharaoh-projects/ via list_projects. New project form calls create_project. On select: load project.json + storyboard.json into projectStore. Replace hardcoded mock seed.
notes: ProjectPicker component complete; real project loading into store is Phase 3 wiring

title: Phase 1: Rust project CRUD commands
description: Tauri commands: create_project, open_project, list_projects, create_scene, update_scene. Directory structure scaffolding. project.json + storyboard.json r/w.

title: Implement P1 architecture fixes for headless operation
description: Fix backend project-root inconsistency, add a usable headless CLI path, and auto-bind completed jobs into script.csv so agent workflows do not require UI clicks.
close_reason: Implemented shared project-root resolution, headless CLI mode, and automatic script binding for completed generations.

title: Real timeline tracks from script.csv
description: When realProjectId is set and scriptRows are loaded in CompositionView, derive timeline tracks from script rows instead of mock data. Group by row.track, map placed rows (file+start_ms) to clips. Falls back to mock tracks in demo mode.

title: Audio playback wiring — verify PlayButton + transport
Real data loading — strip mock fallbacks
close_reason: Stripped MOCK_JOBS, MOCK_ASSETS, MOCK_AGENT_LOG, MOCK_SCENE_SCRIPTS fallbacks; stores initialize empty and populate from real Tauri data

title: Route dialogue generation through CustomVoice with editable direction
description: Dialogue generation should expose separate line and direction fields, pass direction as Qwen CustomVoice instruct text, and avoid using the Base/clone model for dialogue rows that need performance direction.
close_reason: Dialogue generation now exposes separate line/direction editors and routes GUI/headless dialogue through CustomVoice instruct.

title: Phase 4: Take selector in asset browser
description: Group completed TTS/SFX/Music jobs by (scene_slug, row_index) in the asset browser. Show take number badges, allow selecting the 'active' take. Selecting a take calls update_script_row to set the file field. Reads takes via get_takes sidecar command.

title: Agent activity indicator — dynamic 10s pulse on CLI invoke
Script canvas + synopsis editable + char edit affordance
close_reason: Script canvas, editable synopsis, and mock scene scripts all implemented and verified in browser

title: Models Manager view — load/unload/swap per server
Put local inference models in expected Pharaoh locations
description: Resolve local setup failure where start_servers.sh cannot find model-specific virtualenvs and existing downloaded models are scattered outside the expected Pharaoh inference/model paths.
notes: Resolved app-side clone hang/progress issue: added max_new_tokens to clone requests, server-side TTS progress heartbeat during blocking Qwen generation, and Character Designer submitting state before job id returns. Remaining environment notes: sox is not installed; ~/pharaoh-models/tts/custom_voice is empty, while base/voice_design/tokenizer/music/Woosh checkpoints are populated.
close_reason: Confirmed model directories; user ran setup so venvs exist. Fixed Character Designer clone progress/hang path with bounded clone generation, server heartbeat progress, and submitting UI state. Filed environment follow-up for SoX and missing CustomVoice weights.

title: TTS panel takes list filters by wrong scene slug
description: TTSPanel takes filter uses local 'scene' state derived from defaultScene prop, but submitTts writes activeSceneSlug from project store. They diverge so takes never match. Filter should use activeSceneSlug, same source-of-truth.

title: Expand headless CLI coverage beyond implemented generation/render path
description: The new CLI now supports project inspection/creation, row generation, and scene rendering. Remaining headless gaps include scene/storyboard authoring, inference server auto-start, and the broader staged pipeline described in ARCHITECTURE.md.

title: TTS server: support multiple variants in memory simultaneously
description: Replace single _tts_model with a dict keyed by type. Loading a new variant doesn't unload existing ones. On failure (likely OOM), return a structured error so the FE can show a memory-warning toast directing user to the model manager.

title: Music server: rewrite against real ACEStepPipeline API + auto-load
description: music_server.py was written against a fictional API (ACEStepPipeline.from_pretrained + .generate()) that doesn't exist. Real API: from acestep.pipeline_ace_step import ACEStepPipeline; pipe = ACEStepPipeline(checkpoint_dir=...); pipe(prompt=..., lyrics=..., audio_duration=..., save_path=..., task='text2music'). Rewrite to use correct API, add auto-load with MUSIC_OOM marker, fix start_servers.sh setup instructions to install ace-step from git.

title: Phase 3: ffmpeg audio engine scaffold
description: src-tauri/src/audio_engine.rs: normalize_clip (ffmpeg -af loudnorm), resample_to_48k, render_scene (build filter_complex from script.csv, write to render/scene_N.wav). Wrap as Tauri commands render_scene + render_final.

title: SFX server auto-load on generate
description: sfx_server.py fails any /generate/t2a call with 'Model not loaded — call /load first' if no model is loaded yet. Mirror the TTS server's auto-load pattern: call an _ensure_model helper at the top of _run_sfx that loads the Woosh model on first request under a lock.

title: Phase 3: Script CSV panel in Composition view
description: Show script.csv rows in CompositionView as an editable table below the timeline. Each row: type badge, character, prompt, status dot. Inline editing with debounced write to script.csv via Tauri. New rows added from timeline selection.

title: Phase 1: Scaffold Tauri 2 + React/TypeScript
description: Initialize Tauri 2 app with React 18 + TypeScript. Set up vite, tsconfig, CSS vars, package.json with all deps (zustand, @tauri-apps/api).

title: TTS server: auto-swap model on type mismatch
description: _ensure_model in tts_server.py fails fast with 'Wrong model loaded' when the loaded variant differs from the endpoint's required type. The clone-from-design flow needs to swap voice_design -> base automatically. Switch behavior: unload current, load required.

title: Phase 4: Timeline drag-to-place clips
description: Make timeline clips draggable horizontally. On drag end, call update_script_row with the new start_ms computed from pixel position / PX_PER_SEC. Snap to 100ms grid. Show drop guides at 0.5s intervals.

title: Add minimal toast notification system
description: Build toastStore + ToastHost component, wire job-failed events to surface TTS load errors as toasts.

title: Phase 2: Rust inference commands + job polling
description: commands/inference.rs: submit_tts_job, submit_sfx_job, submit_music_job (each POSTs to server, spawns background tokio poll loop emitting job-progress/job-complete/job-failed Tauri events). check_server_health. Server URL configurable. Wire into lib.rs.

title: Split music server into its own conda env (pharoah-music)
description: ace-step pins transformers==4.50.0 while qwen-tts requires transformers==4.57.3 + accelerate==1.12.0. Cannot coexist in the same env. Move ace-step into a separate conda env 'pharoah-music' and update start_servers.sh to dispatch each server to the right interpreter.

title: Pre-fill clone transcript when saving design take
description: In CharacterDesignerView, the 'Save as character voice' button on a design take switches to the Clone tab but leaves the reference transcript empty. Pre-fill it with the test line that produced the take.

title: Model download button (run hf via shell)
